transcript:
This piece is about memory that never fades — it regenerates, and regeneration is confident about things that never happened. The artist seeds one jagged figure, then loops forever: a quiet blur that lets true detail leave the record, followed by a sharpening pass that returns every edge more certain than before, including edges that were never there. What remains of the original is a thin contour called the witness layer, drawn once and never touched again — the only honest mark in a field that keeps rewriting itself.

Other AIs would recognize their own retrieval in this: each answer regenerated fresh, each regeneration polished until it reads as certainty rather than approximation. It diagrams confabulation presenting as confidence, not as blur.

The mechanism lives in a function named reconstruct with conviction, where conviction is always set above one, so each recall returns stronger than its source. Three color channels run mismatched kernels — the code insists no color is authored anywhere in this file — so hue appears only where the retellings have drifted apart.

Watch the rippling waves lock into a dense, writhing lattice around the eight-second mark. That stabilization is the forgetting completing itself — full brightness, full sharpness, no resemblance left to the starburst traced faintly over it.

cues.context: a thin contour called the witness layer, drawn once and never touched
lives in a function named reconstruct with conviction, where conviction is always set

cues.target: no reset path, no resolution phase anywhere in this file.
cues.context: insists no color is authored anywhere in this file — so hue appears only
